# LibraVDB — Full Reference

> Local-first, three-tier memory engine for the OpenClaw AI assistant.

## Overview

LibraVDB is a memory plugin for OpenClaw that stores, retrieves, and manages AI conversation memory entirely on-device. It consists of two components:

1. **libravdbd** (Go sidecar) — background daemon handling vector storage, ONNX embedding inference (Nomic Embed v1.5), BM25 keyword indexing, T5 extractive compaction, and the multi-signal retrieval/ranking pipeline.
2. **@xdarkicex/openclaw-memory-libravdb** (TypeScript plugin) — OpenClaw plugin that communicates with the sidecar over a local Unix socket and owns both the `memory` and `contextEngine` slots.

## Architecture

- Communication: local Unix socket (no network required)
- Storage: SQLite + HNSW vector index on disk
- Embedding: Nomic Embed v1.5 via ONNX Runtime (~16ms per operation)
- Retrieval: hybrid semantic (cosine similarity) + keyword (BM25) with recency decay, scope weighting, and summary quality scoring
- Compaction: T5 extractive summarizer keeps long-term memory lean
- Scoping: three tiers — ephemeral (cleared on session end), session (persists per conversation), long-term (persists indefinitely)

## Installation

### One-Line Bootstrap (Recommended)

```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xDarkicex/openclaw-memory-libravdb/main/install.sh | bash
```

Prerequisites: Homebrew and the `openclaw` CLI must be installed.

The script installs the Homebrew formula, starts the daemon service, installs the OpenClaw plugin, and restarts the gateway.

### Manual Install

```bash
brew install xDarkicex/openclaw-libravdb-memory/libravdbd
brew services start libravdbd
openclaw plugins install @xdarkicex/openclaw-memory-libravdb
openclaw gateway restart
```

### Verify

```bash
openclaw memory status
```

## Performance Benchmarks

- Embedding latency: ~16ms per operation
- Retrieval (hybrid search): ~4ms p50
- Compaction cycle: ~120ms per batch
- Storage overhead: ~1.2KB per memory entry

## Integrations

- OpenClaw AI assistant
- Nomic Embed (ONNX Runtime)
- Homebrew (macOS package management)
- Go sidecar binary (cross-platform: macOS, Linux, Windows)

## Links

- Homepage: https://libravdb.com

- FAQ: https://libravdb.com/faq
